name: RP Super
description:
Welcome to RP Super. A cyberpunk world in the year 2647, with people with robotic and mutant parts. Live your life as a businessman, a president, a police officer, a millionaire or a prisoner, or if you are lucky (or unlucky) to be born with powers, you can become a very powerful hero or villain, or just have a normal life having to endure the prejudice of being born as a mutant. NSFW and violence are allowed.!

___________________________

Remake of this bot. I tried to fix the issues, but if the bot still keeps talking for you I can't do anything.

Sorry...😢
